implementationAliases.purpose: Protected PWA accent rhythm for active nav, icons, badges, progress, filters, and highlights.
Readable foreground for tiny text on bright tertiary accents; keeps the bright green background intact.
Hover state for contrast-safe filled text actions.
Foreground for contrast-safe filled text actions.

implementationAliases.implementation: --gg-radius-* only; no shared Tailwind rounded-* override
implementationAliases.purpose: Canonical radius outputs without changing existing client rounded utilities.

pwaProtection.primaryRole: DesignMD colors.primary is ink/charcoal and must not be mapped to --color-primary.
pwaProtection.tertiaryRole: DesignMD colors.tertiary is the existing bright PWA green accent implementation.
pwaProtection.actionRole: DesignMD colors.tertiary-action is reserved for filled text actions that need white foreground contrast.
pwaProtection.shellFreeze: Token generation must not change AppShell height, bottom AppBar behavior, safe-area padding, or /home/garden and /home/:id/work/:workId AppBar hiding.
